# WINetworkSharingError.appNotPermitted

**Case**

Indicates the person hasn’t granted your app permission to use the shared networks API for the accessory.

## Declaration

```swift
case appNotPermitted
```

## Checking for app issues

- **WINetworkSharingError.appNotInForeground**: Indicates your app can’t perform the requested operation because it isn’t running in the foreground.
